subcodes.title: Words to several Baha'is, spoken on 1912-07-01
subcodes.first_line: I desire to make manifest among the friends in America a new light that they may become a new people
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @being a source of light; guidance, @words vs deeds, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion
